payload.title: Exhibit Book Finance Committee Meeting 5/26/2021
payload.description: Finance Committee Meeting exhibit book containing BudgetWatch May 2021 Flash Report, 2020 Annual Investment Report, 2020 Annual Pension Presentation, DRAFT MTA Consolidated Financial Statements, and FMTC 2021 Annual Meeting materials

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group") was established under the New York Public Authorities Law and is a public benefit corporation and a component unit of the State of New York

payload.description: Public benefit corporation and component unit of the State of New York that provides transportation services in the New York metropolitan area, operating seven bridges and two tunnels within New York City and primary insurance coverage

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority ("MTA" or "MTA Group") was established under the New York Public Authorities Law and is a public benefit corporation and a component unit of the State of New York whose mission is to continue, develop, and improve public transportation

tool_args.label: MTA New York City Transit
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit Authority (\"MTA New York City Transit\") and its subsidiary, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority (\"MaBSTOA\"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

payload.description: Provides subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit Authority ("MTA New York City Transit") and its subsidiary, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority ("MaBSTOA"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Company
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Bus Company (\"MTA Bus\") operates certain bus routes in areas previously served by private bus operators pursuant to franchises granted by the City of New York.

payload.description: Operates certain bus routes in areas previously served by private bus operators pursuant to franchises granted by the City of New York

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Bus Company ("MTA Bus") operates certain bus routes in areas previously served by private bus operators pursuant to franchises granted by the City of New York.

tool_args.label: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority (MaBSTOA)
tool_args.raw_text: Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority (\"MaBSTOA\"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit Authority ("MTA New York City Transit") and its subsidiary, Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority ("MaBSTOA"), provide subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City.

tool_args.label: MTA Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road Company (\"MTA Long Island Rail Road\") provides passenger transportation between New York City (\"NYC\") and Long Island.

payload.entity_name: The Long Island Rail Road Company
payload.description: Provides passenger transportation between New York City and Long Island

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Long Island Rail Road Company ("MTA Long Island Rail Road") provides passenger transportation between New York City ("NYC") and Long Island.

tool_args.label: MTA Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company (\"MTA Metro-North Railroad\") provides passenger transportation between NYC and the suburban communities in Westchester, Dutchess, Putnam, Orange, and Rockland counties in NYS and New Haven and Fairfield counties in Connecticut.

payload.description: Provides passenger transportation between NYC and suburban communities in New York and Connecticut

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company ("MTA Metro-North Railroad") provides passenger transportation between NYC and the suburban communities in Westchester, Dutchess, Putnam, Orange, and Rockland counties in NYS and New Haven and Fairfield counties in Connecticut.

tool_args.label: MTA Bridges and Tunnels

payload.description: Operates seven toll bridges, two tunnels, and the Battery Parking Garage within the five boroughs of New York City

evidence_refs.source_quote: Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority ("MTA Bridges and Tunnels") operates seven toll bridges, two tunnels, and the Battery Parking Garage, all within the five boroughs of New York City.

tool_args.label: Preliminary MTA system-wide ridership decline 2020 vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: Preliminary MTA system-wide utilization through the fourth quarter of 2020 decreased substantially relative to 2019, with ridership down by 1,604 million trips (62.7%).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Preliminary MTA system-wide utilization through the fourth quarter of 2020 decreased substantially relative to 2019, with ridership down by 1,604 million trips (62.7%).

tool_args.label: B&T vehicle crossing decline 2020 vs 2019
tool_args.raw_text: Vehicle traffic at MTA Bridges and Tunnels facilities in 2020 decreased by 76.2 million crossings (23.1%) compared with 2019 levels.

tool_args.label: NYCT fare revenue 2020
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue from fares was $2,012 in 2020, a decrease of $2,582, or 56.2%, compared to 2019. Total ridership was 856 million, a decrease of 1,410 or 62.2% from 2019.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenue from fares was $2,012 in 2020, a decrease of $2,582, or 56.2%, compared to 2019.

tool_args.label: Bus Plans maintained in November Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Maintain prior plan investments such as on-going investment initiatives, including the MTA Long Island Rail Road "Forward" plan, the "Bus Plans" at MTA New York City Transit and MTA Bus, and the MTA Metro-North Railroad "Way Ahead" plan.

payload.claim_text: The November Plan maintains prior plan investments such as on-going investment initiatives, including the "Bus Plans" at MTA New York City Transit and MTA Bus.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Maintain prior plan investments such as on-going investment initiatives, including the MTA Long Island Rail Road "Forward" plan, the "Bus Plans" at MTA New York City Transit and MTA Bus

tool_args.label: Passenger revenue favorable variance YTD April 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Passenger revenues through April were favorable by $343 million (85%)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Passenger revenues through April were favorable by $343 million (85%), reflecting higher ridership against the budget

tool_args.label: Toll revenue favorable variance YTD April 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Toll revenue through April was $246 million (71%) favorable due to higher-than-budgeted traffic volume.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Toll revenue through April was $246 million (71%) favorable due to higher-than-budgeted traffic volume.

tool_args.label: Operating expenses favorable variance YTD April 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Operating expenses through April were favorable by $301 million (7%).

tool_args.label: COVID-19 pandemic severely impacted MTA services
tool_args.raw_text: The effective shut-down of the metropolitan area in response to the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in a severe decline in the utilization of MTA services

payload.claim_text: The effective shut-down of the metropolitan area in response to the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in a severe decline in the utilization of MTA services that began to slowly improve as the region moved through the State-mandated re-opening phases.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The effective shut-down of the metropolitan area in response to the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in a severe decline in the utilization of MTA services
